html:
Exclusive to:

The Seashell Suit is an Armor Item in the Shipwrecked DLC, made with 10 Seashells, two Seaweed and one Rope. It requires a Science Machine to prototype, will absorb 75% of damage taken, and prevent the player from getting Poisoned by physical attacks.

The Seashell Suit protects against Poison from Poison Snakes, Poison Mosquitoes, Spider Warriors and Yellow Crocodogs.

Note that this item does not protect against clouds of poison gas, such as those from Stink Rays and Poison Holes.

Tips

  • It can be especially helpful to wear the Seashell Suit when chopping Jungle Trees as Poison Snakes may appear.
  • Keeping a Seashell Suit in the inventory during Monsoon Season can be really handy, since it is a cheap way to protect the character from Poison Mosquitoes. It is also more efficient than carrying an Anti Venom and armor at the same time, saving one inventory slot.
  • It is recommended to carry a Seashell Suit or Horned Helmet when gambling at the Slot Machine, since there is a chance to get Poison Snakes or Poison Mosquitoes after a spin.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Willow wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wendy wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • WX-78 wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Woodie wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wes wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Maxwell wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Webber wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Walani wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Warly wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wilbur wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wilba wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wormwood wearing a Seashell Suit.
  • Wheeler wearing a Seashell Suit.

“She wears seashells by the seashore.”
–Wheeler

Keeping a Seashell Suit in the inventory during Monsoon Season can be really handy, since it is a cheap way to protect the character from Poison Mosquitoes. It is also more efficient than carrying an Anti Venom and armor at the same time, saving one inventory slot.
It is recommended to carry a Seashell Suit or Horned Helmet when gambling at the Slot Machine, since there is a chance to get Poison Snakes or Poison Mosquitoes after a spin.

The '''Seashell Suit''' is an [[Armor]] [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, made with 10 [[Seashell]]s, two [[Seaweed]] and one [[Rope]]. It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, will absorb 75% of damage taken, and prevent the player from getting [[Poison]]ed by physical attacks.

The Seashell Suit protects against Poison from [[Poison Snake]]s, [[Poison Mosquito]]es, [[Spider Warrior]]s and [[Crocodog#Yellow Crocodog|Yellow Crocodogs]].

Note that this item does ''not'' protect against clouds of poison gas, such as those from [[Stink Ray|Stink Rays]] and [[Poisonous Hole|Poison Holes]].

=={{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* It can be especially helpful to wear the Seashell Suit when chopping [[Jungle Tree]]s as Poison Snakes may appear.
* Keeping a Seashell Suit in the inventory during [[Monsoon Season]] can be really handy, since it is a cheap way to protect the character from Poison Mosquitoes. It is also more efficient than carrying an [[Anti Venom]] and armor at the same time, saving one inventory slot.
* It is recommended to carry a Seashell Suit or [[Horned Helmet]] when gambling at the [[Slot Machine]], since there is a chance to get Poison Snakes or Poison Mosquitoes after a spin.
